{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185935401663EBEEE4CA8366E7"}"},"total":3068},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7534462860620628798","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作为女生，第一次看以男性视角写的这种网文，我没有觉得有不适的地方。作者尊重女性，宣扬男女平等，女性角色塑造好，无令人不适。作者文笔也好，没什么令人尴尬的地方，男主性格形象也好，有实力，却没有“霸天”的嚣张，有目标，三观正。当然唯一缺点就是有文抄公，这算是一个雷点。总之，好评好评"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754270910,"group_id":"7486526932079627288","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只喜欢无cp","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4vtr4AgFDeDIrd3xD98yhM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/032c0a2f0474478e9b24ce81d880415b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789639&x-signature=qwOO46SVKi6dJjo4UgLhJKCEptk%3D","user_id":"712092624885896","user_name":"等雾散尽山头"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"712092624885896","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7486526932079627288","book_info":{"abstract":"［科举+朝堂+种田+架空+日常+轻松+无CP］
黎诉高考状元还没捂热，就穿成了老黎家的幺子，一家子都宠着，整个家吃糠咽菜的都要供他读书。
而原主被同窗带坏，自私自利只想玩乐，把自己搞没了。
黎诉穿来后想为这个家做点什么，去田里干了一天后，他决定还是老老实实读书吧，读书他擅长。
黎诉一路考来，六元及第，高中状元，成了皇帝看重位高权重的新贵。
新皇是个想做出实业的，很是看中黎诉。
皇帝：爱卿，世家嚣张。
黎诉：臣有一计，我略懂些造纸之术，纸廉寒门学子方可崛起，堪能与世家权贵抗衡。
皇帝：爱卿，外敌来犯。
黎诉：臣有一计，我略懂些火药之术，定能让外敌闻风丧胆，不敢再犯。
皇帝：爱卿，国库空虚。
黎诉：臣有一计，我略懂些精盐，白糖之术，可快速收刮富商和周围小国，以丰国库。
皇帝：爱卿……
黎诉：臣还有一计……
众大臣：这合理吗？大家不都是一个脑子吗？
……
在黎诉的一计又一计中，国家和平富裕，百姓安居乐业。
皇帝大悦：爱卿，青史留名！
众大臣傻眼：首辅大人，这是怎么做到的？
黎首辅：学好数理化，走遍天下都不怕。
科举遇黎诉，为官还同朝的学子们：求放过！真的卷不动了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0d6505caffd6619ea8cce6b753c56613","author":"招财林","author_id":"","book_id":"7486526932079627288","book_name":"陛下！科举状元他略懂亿点数理化","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#401810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7486527271763722776","read_count":"138931","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1245128"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"601","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,无女主,搞笑轻松,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/98aa704e2344c05505c531c6b887a595~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447575&x-signature=cR4u4BxaPAWJQ0rgOJe15Vnugvw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3085699627101673","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"133"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185935401663EBEEE4CA8366E7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":174,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":367,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22369,"reply_count":15,"show_pv":68844},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7566885558108504894","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很有文化风范，一路科举，看着很热血，而且三观也挺正的，帮助家庭，组织分配，很有秩序啊！而且没有cp，按目前的进度来看，家庭和睦，教导有序，让人有所改观，倡导平等，姐姐离婚，走向事业，给了女子之后的改观，思想上的成熟。家风良好，各家小孩都很积极。让我看到了一本科举一路的良好风范，而且主角也很聪明，每个角色都有自己的独特，例如他妈妈的爱子心切，和交友的良好风范，在外打仗的将士们的热心费血，主角一路成长为国家自立而强大，通过各种的方式为社会做出巨大的贡献和改观。作者笔下三观正，目标正直，暂时没有雷点，让我们从思想上有所改观。从内容上有所品悟，从价值上有所领悟。很适合观看，期待作者多多更新。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761808203,"group_id":"7486526932079627288","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw3/0dTLIcUv7oFfByZxM0gXPF+Ma9Yc1bHc2XIf2Voh","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"3087843375977000","user_name":"盖世无双的刘队"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3087843375977000","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7486526932079627288","book_info":{"abstract":"［科举+朝堂+种田+架空+日常+轻松+无CP］
